test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_422
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found_404
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books_204
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author who has associated books.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a new book with valid data and existing author/category.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: List books with pagination and filter parameters (author_id, min_price).

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing, non-deleted book by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_204
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_200
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_200
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to a book published more than one year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published in the current year.

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock_200
test_cases.description: Increase the stock quantity of a book using a positive delta.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock by a quantity larger than current stock.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book_201
test_cases.description: Add a review with a valid rating to a book.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_200
test_cases.description: Add multiple existing tags to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_success_201
test_cases.description: Create an order with valid customer data and items in stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order for a book with insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid_transition_200
test_cases.description: Update an order status through a valid state transition (e.g., pending to confirmed).

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition_400
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid status transition (e.g., shipped back to confirmed).

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order_200
test_cases.description: Retrieve an invoice for an order in a confirmed state.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order_403
test_cases.description: Attempt to get an invoice for an order in pending state.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success_207
test_cases.description: Bulk create books where some succeed and some fail (e.g., duplicate ISBN).

test_cases.name: clone_book_with_new_isbn_201
test_cases.description: Clone an existing book, providing a new unique ISBN.

test_cases.name: start_book_export_with_api_key_202
test_cases.description: Start an asynchronous book export job with a valid API key.

test_cases.name: enable_maintenance_mode_200
test_cases.description: Enable maintenance mode using a valid API key.
